roa.docketEntryComment: DFT MOT OR RELEASE/REDUCE BAIL MOTION FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:JURY TRIAL/X:AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TODISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES  MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT #14029258,/
